session.user: Run `make fast-ci` from the repository root /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report the full output. This runs lint, format-check, prettier-check, md-check, docs-validate, ty, test (unit only), and exec-reference-check.
session.assistant: I'll run the `make fast-ci` command from the repository root and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run fast-ci target with lint, format, and test checks

session.tool_result:
Exit code 2 [[33mwarn[39m] docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md [[33mwarn[39m] docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md [[33mwarn[39m] Code style issues found in 2 files. Run Prettier with --write to fix. ✓ AGENTS.md standard: PASSED
All CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md files properly paired.
CLAUDE.md files checked: 19 Violations: 0 make: *** [Makefile:97: fast-ci] Error 1
=== Fast CI ===
--- Lint --- All checks passed!
--- Format Check --- 1722 files already formatted
--- Prettier Check --- Checking formatting...
--- Markdown Check ---
--- Exec Reference Check --- FAIL: .claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md is out of date Run 'erk-dev gen-exec-reference-docs' to regenerate it.
--- ty ---
... [110 lines omitted] ...
session.assistant:
The `make fast-ci` command failed due to issues with Prettier formatting and exec reference documentation. Here's the summary:
## Test Results
**Status:** FAILED (Exit code 2)
### Failures:
1. **Prettier Check (2 files need formatting):** - `docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` - `docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
Fix: Run Prettier with --write
2. **Exec Reference Check:** - `.claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md` is out of date
Fix: Run `erk-dev gen-exec-reference-docs` to regenerate
### Passing Checks:
- **Lint:** All checks passed - **Format Check:** 1722 files already formatted - **Markdown Check:** Passed - **CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md Validation:** PASSED (19 CLAUDE.md files, 0 violations) - **Type Checking (ty):** All checks passed - **Unit Tests (erk):** 6024 passed in 25.74s - **Tests (erk-dev):** 136 passed in 6.00s - **Tests (erk-statusline):** 115 passed in 0.87s - **Tests (erk-mcp):** 28 passed
### Summary:
Out of the 7 major check categories, 5 passed completely and 2 have issues to fix: 1. Prettier formatting on 2 markdown files 2. Exec reference documentation is out of sync
